text.title: consistency-standards Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for consistency-standards as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent proposes canonical terms without platform HIG validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs pick the most common term in existing usage, which may be a legacy wrong term. Always validate canonical term selection against Apple HIG, Material Design, or Windows Fluent before adopting.

failure-mode.description: Agent treats locale-specific idiomatic differences as inconsistencies (Submit in en-US, Send in en-GB).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Scope terminology audits to a single locale first. Cross-locale differences may be intentional and correct.
